Compliance.description: Fully licensed FSCA non-life insurer (FSP 33970), no major regulatory issues in 2025/2026.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 3.87/5 (4213 reviews, NPS 49); mixed on claims speed; some positive recent reviews.

Product Value.description: Competitive premiums, multi-product options (vehicle/home/travel/pet), Vaps (tyre/rim/rental), good value when claims work.

Innovation.description: TelemApp driving monitor, self-service app, electronic claims, online quotes, eSignature contracts.

Customer Support.description: 0860/phone/app, Mon-Fri 7-6/Sat 8-1; mixed HelloPeter reviews on resolution speed.

Accessibility & Security.description: App with secure data, POPIA compliant, online self-service; no major breaches.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Personalized quotes; competitive vs direct insurers; online quote tool

socialSentiment.summary: Mixed HelloPeter/Trustpilot on claims; positive on pricing/innovation; no major negatives.
